hooks.command: sh -c 't=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); s="$t/.claude/skills/worktree-review-gate/scripts/gate.sh"; [ -f "$s" ] && exec bash "$s" SessionStart || { printf "{}\n"; exit 0; }'
sh -c 't=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); s="$t/.claude/skills/worktree-review-gate/scripts/gate.sh"; [ -f "$s" ] && exec bash "$s" Stop || { printf "{}\n"; exit 0; }'
